current_slogan: Acne Studios — 斯堪的纳维亚创意与高端时尚的融合
description_zh: Acne Studios是瑞典斯德哥尔摩的多元化奢侈时装品牌，由创意总监乔尼·约翰森（Jonny Johansson）于1996年创立。品牌最初以创意广告公司起家，1997年推出了100条免费牛仔裤的实验性营销活动，这一举动使得Acne Studios在时尚界声名鹊起，也奠定了品牌独立不羁的个性基调。如今Acne Studios的产品线涵盖男女成衣、鞋履、配饰、牛仔和家居用品，设计风格融合了斯堪的纳维亚的极简美学与前卫的艺术表达。品牌标志性的笑脸Logo和粉色元素已成为当代时尚的重要符号，被全球数百万消费者所熟知和喜爱。Acne Studios的设计注重线条的简洁性和结构的创新性，每季系列都展现出对面料质感和色彩搭配的极致探索。品牌在斯德哥尔摩、巴黎、伦敦、纽约、东京、首尔等全球时尚之都设有旗舰店，其门店建筑本身即是设计艺术的展示，比如东京表参道的店面由著名建筑事务所设计。Acne Studios多次与当代艺术家合作，推出联名系列，不断拓展时尚与艺术的边界。品牌还涉足出版领域，发行Acne Paper杂志，深入探讨当代文化、艺术和生活方式议题。2020年代，Acne Studios加速了在亚洲市场的扩张步伐，特别是在中国开设了多家门店，深受年轻消费者的追捧。品牌的文化影响力已远超服装本身，深入渗透到当代生活方式和审美观念的方方面面。从音乐节着装到街拍造型，Acne Studios的经典款式如皮靴、围巾和牛仔外套成为时尚爱好者衣橱中不可或缺的单品。品牌的核心价值在于创意与个性的表达，每一位穿着者都能通过Acne Studios的产品展现独特的自我风格。此外，品牌还积极拥抱可持续发展理念，在生产过程中采用更加环保的面料和工艺，致力于减少对环境的影响。Acne Studios的合作对象涵盖当代艺术家、音乐人和建筑师，跨界合作贯穿品牌发展的各个阶段。品牌在社交媒体上拥有庞大的粉丝群体，其独特的视觉语言和美学理念通过Instagram等平台传播到全球各地。作为斯堪的纳维亚时尚的代表品牌之一，Acne Studios成功地将北欧设计哲学与全球化的时尚潮流相结合，在竞争激烈的奢侈时尚行业中占据了一席之地。品牌的未来发展方向将继续围绕着创意创新和艺术表达展开，同时保持对品质和细节的极致追求，为全球消费者带来更多令人惊喜的设计作品。

languages.en:
Acne Studios is a multidisciplinary luxury fashion house based in Stockholm, Sweden, that specializes in men's and women's ready-to-wear fashion, footwear, accessories and denim. When founded in 1996, the label derived its name from the creative collective ACNE; initially an acronym for Associated Computer Nerd Enterprises and later a backronym of Ambition to Create Novel Expressions. Founder and Creative Director Jonny Johannson's interest in photography, art, architecture and contemporary culture is reflected in the brand's clothing, publications, furniture, exhibitions and special collaborations. == History ==
Acne Studios was founded in 1996 in Stockholm, Sweden as part of the creative collective ACNE that focused on graphic design, film, production and advertising. In 1997, cofounder Jonny Johansson created 100 pairs of raw denim jeans with red stitching and gave them away to friends and family. Wallpaper* and Vogue Paris quickly picked up on the popularity of the jeans and Acne Studios rapidly expanded their fashion offering outside of denim. In 2006, Acne Studios became a standalone company and separated from other entities within the collective ACNE such as Acne Film, Acne Advertising and Acne Digital, at the same time launching their e-commerce operation. Since launching, Acne Studios has grown into a global fashion house with retail stores around the world including Paris, London, New York, Los Angeles, Antwerp and Tokyo, offering women's and men's ready-to-wear collections, showing at Paris Fashion Week twice a year and turning over $215 million annually in 2016. In December 2018 IDG Capital and I.T Group acquired stakes of 30.1% and 10.9% respectively, from the investment companies Creades, Öresund and PAN Capital. Jonny Johansson and the executive chairman Mikael Schiller remained as majority shareholders. The company rejected a takeover offer, for example by Kering, for years. At the end of 2018, the Chinese investment company IDG Capital and the Hong Kong fashion company IT acquired 30.1% and 10.9% of the company's shares from Investment AB Öresund, Creades, and Pan Capital, respectively. However, Mikael Schiller and Jonny Johansson remained majority shareholders. In 2019, the company moved its headquarters from Gamla stan (Lilla Nygatan 23) to Floragatan 13 (Granen 21) in Stockholm, the former Czechoslovak embassy building. Acne creative director Jonny Johansson and many other designers were involved in the redesign of the listed brutalist building, designed by Jan Bočan. In the 2019/20 financial year, there were 60 Acne Studios boutiques worldwide, including several shops-in-shops in larger department stores, such as Galeries Lafayette and Shinsegae. The company supplies around 800 retailers and online retailers worldwide, employing over 700 people. Acne's annual sales amounted to 2.34 billion kroner, equivalent to over 200 million euros. == Products ==

Acne Studios design men's and women's ready-to-wear fashion, footwear, denim, and accessories including handbags, small leather goods, and eyewear. Acne Studios stages runway fashion shows for its women's Fall/Winter and Spring/Summer collections twice a year.
languages.fr:
Découvrez l'histoire fascinante de cette maison de mode emblématique. Acne Studios is a multidisciplinary luxury fashion house based in Stockholm, Sweden, that specializes in men's and women's ready-to-wear fashion, footwear, accessories and denim. When founded in 1996, the label derived its name from the creative collective ACNE; initially an acronym for Associated Computer Nerd Enterprises and later a backronym of Ambition to Create Novel Expressions. Founder and Creative Director Jonny Johannson's interest in photography, art, architecture and contemporary culture is reflected in the brand's clothing, publications, furniture, exhibitions and special collaborations. == History ==
Acne Studios was founded in 1996 in Stockholm, Sweden as part of the creative collective ACNE that focused on graphic design, film, production and advertising. In 1997, cofounder Jonny Johansson created 100 pairs of raw denim jeans with red stitching and gave them away to friends and family. Wallpaper* and Vogue Paris quickly picked up on the popularity of the jeans and Acne Studios rapidly expanded their fashion offering outside of denim. In 2006, Acne Studios became a standalone company and separated from other entities within the collective ACNE such as Acne Film, Acne Advertising and Acne Digital, at the same time launching their e-commerce operation. Since launching, Acne Studios has grown into a global fashion house with retail stores around the world including Paris, London, New York, Los Angeles, Antwerp and Tokyo, offering women's and men's ready-to-wear collections, showing at Paris Fashion Week twice a year and turning over $215 million annually in 2016. In December 2018 IDG Capital and I.T Group acquired stakes of 30.1% and 10.9% respectively, from the investment companies Creades, Öresund and PAN Capital. Jonny Johansson and the executive chairman Mikael Schiller remained as majority shareholders. The company rejected a takeover offer, for example by Kering, for years. At the end of 2018, the Chinese investment company IDG Capital and the Hong Kong fashion company IT acquired 30.1% and 10.9% of the company's shares from Investment AB Öresund, Creades, and Pan Capital, respectively. However, Mikael Schiller and Jonny Johansson remained majority shareholders. In 2019, the company moved its headquarters from Gamla stan (Lilla Nygatan 23) to Floragatan 13 (Granen 21) in Stockholm, the former Czechoslovak embassy building. Acne creative director Jonny Johansson and many other designers were involved in the redesign of the listed brutalist building, designed by Jan Bočan. In the 2019/20 financial year, there were 60 Acne Studios boutiques worldwide, including several shops-in-shops in larger department stores, such as Galeries Lafayette and Shinsegae. The company supplies around 800 retailers and online retailers worldwide, employing over 700 people. Acne's annual sales amounted to 2.34 billion kroner, equivalent to over 200 million euros. == Products ==

Acne Studios design men's and women's ready-to-wear fashion, footwear, denim, and accessories including handbags, small leather goods, and eyewear. Acne Studios stages runway fashion shows for its women's Fall/Winter and Spring/Summer collections twice a year. On 6 April 2017, Acne Studios relaunched its denim collection under the name Acne Studios Blå Konst (meaning "Blue Art" in Swedish) at all of their retail locations and on Acnestudios.com. This launch consists of men's and women's ready-to-wear, jeans, and accessories.

The company supplies around 800 retailers and online retailers worldwide, employing over 700 people. Acne's annual sales amounted to 2.34 billion kroner, equivalent to over 200 million euros.
languages.ja: Acne Studios（アクネストゥディオズ）は、クリエイティブディレクターのヨニー・ヨハンソンによって1996年にストックホルムで設立されたスウェーデンのラグジュアリーファッションブランドです。クリエイティブ広告会社としてスタートし、1997年に100本の無料ジーンズを配布する実験的なマーケティングキャンペーンを展開。この出来事をきっかけにファッション業界で大きな注目を集め、ブランドの自由で型にはまらない個性を確立しました。現在ではメンズ・ウィメンズの既製服、フットウェア、アクセサリー、デニム、ホームグッズまで幅広く展開。デザインはスカンジナビアのミニマルな美学と前衛的なアート表現を融合させたスタイルが特徴です。ブランドの象徴であるスマイルロゴとピンクカラーは、現代ファッションの重要なシンボルとして世界中の何百万人もの消費者に認知されています。デザインはラインのシンプルさと構造の革新性を重視し、毎シーズン素材の質感と色彩の組み合わせに対する探求心あふれるコレクションを発表しています。ストックホルム、パリ、ロンドン、ニューヨーク、東京、ソウルなど世界の主要ファッション都市に旗艦店を構えています。特に東京表参道の店舗は著名建築事務所によるデザインで、建築芸術の傑作としても高く評価されています。現代アーティストとのコラボレーションも積極的に行い、ファッションとアートの境界線を常に探求。出版部門ではAcne Paperを発行し、現代文化やライフスタイルに関する深い考察を提供しています。2020年代にはアジア市場での展開を加速し、特に中国では複数の直営店をオープンし、若い世代から熱狂的な支持を集めています。ブランドの文化的影響力は衣料品を超えて、現代のライフスタイルや美意識の形成にまで及んでいます。サステナビリティへの取り組みも積極的で、環境に配慮した素材の使用や倫理的な製造プロセスを推進しています。またミュージックフェスティバルやストリートファッションのシーンでも高い人気を誇り、多くのセレブリティやファッションインフルエンサーがAcne Studiosのアイテムを愛用しています。スカンジナビアンデザインの代表格として、ミニマルでありながら個性的なスタイルを追求し続け、世界中のファッション愛好家から支持されるブランドへと成長を遂げました。
languages.ko: Acne Studios(악네 스튜디오스)는 크리에이티브 디렉터 요니 요한슨이 1996년 스톡홀름에서 설립한스웨덴의 럭셔리 패션 브랜드입니다. 크리에이티브 광고 회사로 시작하여 1997년 100개의 무료 청바지를배포하는 실험적인 마케팅 캠페인을 진행했습니다. 이 이벤트를 계기로 패션 업계의 큰 주목을 받았고,브랜드의 자유롭고 틀에 박히지 않은 개성을 확립했습니다. 현재는 남성복과 여성복 기성품, 신발, 액세서리,데님, 홈 굿즈까지 폭넓게 전개하고 있습니다. 디자인은 스칸디나비아의 미니멀한 미학과 아방가르드한 예술 표현을융합한 스타일이 특징입니다. 브랜드의 상징인 스마일 로고와 핑크 컬러는 현대 패션의 중요한 심볼로전 세계 수백만 소비자에게 인식되고 있습니다. 디자인은 라인의 단순성과 구조의 혁신성을 중시하며,매 시즌 소재의 질감과 색상 조합에 대한 탐구심이 돋보이는 컬렉션을 선보입니다.스톡홀름, 파리, 런던, 뉴욕, 도쿄, 서울 등 세계 주요 패션 도시에 플래그십 스토어를 운영하고 있습니다.특히 도쿄 오모테산도 매장은 유명 건축 사무소의 디자인으로 건축 예술의 걸작으로 평가받고 있습니다.현대 아티스트와의 콜라보레이션도 활발히 진행하며 패션과 예술의 경계를 끊임없이 탐구합니다.출판 부문에서는 Acne Paper를 발행하여 현대 문화와 라이프스타일에 대한 깊이 있는 통찰을 제공합니다.2020년대에는 아시아 시장에서의 전개를 가속화하여 특히 중국에 여러 직영 매장을 오픈했으며,젊은 세대로부터 열광적인 지지를 받고 있습니다. 브랜드의 문화적 영향력은 의류를 넘어현대 라이프스타일과 미의식 형성에까지 미치고 있습니다. 지속 가능한 패션을 위한 노력도 계속하고 있으며,환경 친화적인 소재 사용과 윤리적 제조 공정을 도입하고 있습니다. 많은 셀러브리티와 패션 인플루언서들이Acne Studios 제품을 애용하며 브랜드의 인지도를 높이고 있습니다. 미니멀하면서도 개성 넘치는 스타일로전 세계 패션 애호가들의 사랑을 받는 브랜드로 성장했습니다.
languages.ar: اغوص في تاريخ هذه العلامة التجارية الفاخرة. Acne Studios is a multidisciplinary luxury fashion house based in Stockholm, Sweden, that specializes in men's and women's ready-to-wear fashion, footwear, accessories and denim. When founded in 1996, the label derived its name from the creative collective ACNE; initially an acronym for Associated Computer Nerd Enterprises and later a backronym of Ambition to Create Novel Expressions. Founder and Creative Director Jonny Johannson's interest in photography, art, architecture and contemporary culture is reflected in the brand's clothing, publications, furniture, exhibitions and special collaborations.   == History == Acne Studios was founded in 1996 in Stockholm, Sweden as part of the creative collective ACNE that focused on graphic design, film, production and advertising. In 1997, cofounder Jonny Johansson created 100 pairs of raw denim jeans with red stitching and gave them away to friends and family. Wallpaper* and Vogue Paris quickly picked up on the popularity of the jeans and Acne Studios rapidly expanded their fashion offering outside of denim. In 2006, Acne Studios became a standalone company and separated from other entities within the collective ACNE such as Acne Film, Acne Advertising and Acne Digital, at the same time launching their e-commerce operation. Since launching, Acne Studios has grown into a global fashion house with retail stores around the world including Paris, London, New York, Los Angeles, Antwerp and Tokyo, offering women's and men's ready-to-wear collections, showing at Paris Fashion Week twice a year and turning over $215 million annually in 2016 تتمتع هذه العلامة التجارية بدعم كبير من عشاق الموضة حول العالم، وتشتهر بتصاميمها المبتكرة وجودتها الاستثنائية. تواصل العلامة التجارية ريادتها في الصناعة، مبدعة اتجاهات جديدة ومستقبل الموضة. تحترم التقاليد بينما تقدم مجموعات مبتكرة تواكب تغيرات العصر. تدير متاجر رئيسية في المدن الكبرى حول العالم، وتواصل توسعها العالمي بنشاط. من اختيار المواد إلى عمليات التصنيع، تطبق أعلى معايير مراقبة الجودة في كل مرحلة. تتبنى الاستدامة بنشاط، وتدفع نحو تطوير منتجات صديقة للبيئة. يستمر إرث العلامة التجارية وابتكارها في التأثير على المصممين والمبدعين من الجيل القادم.
languages.zh: Acne Studios是瑞典斯德哥尔摩的多元化奢侈时装品牌，由创意总监乔尼·约翰森（Jonny Johansson）于1996年创立。品牌最初以创意广告公司起家，1997年推出了100条免费牛仔裤的实验性营销活动，这一举动使得Acne Studios在时尚界声名鹊起，也奠定了品牌独立不羁的个性基调。如今Acne Studios的产品线涵盖男女成衣、鞋履、配饰、牛仔和家居用品，设计风格融合了斯堪的纳维亚的极简美学与前卫的艺术表达。品牌标志性的笑脸Logo和粉色元素已成为当代时尚的重要符号，被全球数百万消费者所熟知和喜爱。Acne Studios的设计注重线条的简洁性和结构的创新性，每季系列都展现出对面料质感和色彩搭配的极致探索。品牌在斯德哥尔摩、巴黎、伦敦、纽约、东京、首尔等全球时尚之都设有旗舰店，其门店建筑本身即是设计艺术的展示，比如东京表参道的店面由著名建筑事务所设计。Acne Studios多次与当代艺术家合作，推出联名系列，不断拓展时尚与艺术的边界。品牌还涉足出版领域，发行Acne Paper杂志，深入探讨当代文化、艺术和生活方式议题。2020年代，Acne Studios加速了在亚洲市场的扩张步伐，特别是在中国开设了多家门店，深受年轻消费者的追捧。品牌的文化影响力已远超服装本身，深入渗透到当代生活方式和审美观念的方方面面。从音乐节着装到街拍造型，Acne Studios的经典款式如皮靴、围巾和牛仔外套成为时尚爱好者衣橱中不可或缺的单品。
